introduction: This presentation aims to evaluate our Q2 2025 online delivery performance, with a specific focus on average delivery time. It provides a comprehensive understanding of our delivery system's efficiency and areas of improvement.

subsections.heading: Analysis of Q2 2025 Online Sales
subsections.content:
• Q2 2025 saw a 12% increase in online vehicle orders compared to Q1
• The most popular model ordered online was the Elexion E3 sedan
• 65% of online orders came from repeat customers
• The average online buyer age demographic was 35-50
• There was a 16% decrease in online order cancellations compared to Q1
subsections.justification: The content focuses on order statistics and demographics, not delivery times.

subsections.heading: Evaluation of Q2 2025 Delivery Process Efficiency
subsections.content:
• Introduced a new tracking system for better order visibility
• Implemented a more efficient packaging process reducing packing time by 15%
• Enhanced customer communication with real-time delivery updates
• Invested in training drivers to improve customer service during delivery
• Ensured all delivery vehicles are electric, aligning with company's sustainability goals
subsections.justification: The content discusses improvements made to the delivery process, but does not mention delivery times.

subsections.heading: Overview of Q2 2025 Average Vehicle Delivery Time
subsections.content:
• Discussed the importance of reducing delivery times for customer satisfaction
• Highlighted the role of efficient production and logistics in timely delivery
• Reviewed the impact of regional differences on delivery times
• Analyzed how weather conditions can affect delivery times
• Presented initiatives to optimize delivery routes
subsections.justification: The content discusses factors affecting delivery time, but does not provide the actual average delivery time.

conclusion: The Q2 2025 performance assessment shows room for enhancement in our delivery process efficiency. As we move forward, it is crucial to devise strategies to reduce average delivery time, thereby improving customer satisfaction and sales.
